title: T-048 — UI: LP core surfaces (list + detail + 5 modals) — WH-002/003/008/M-05/M-11/M-15/WH-101 (WH §6.4-6.11)
prompt:
# T-048 — UI: LP core surfaces (list + detail + 5 modals) — WH-002/003/008/M-05/M-11/M-15/WH-101 (WH §6.4-6.11)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §6.4, §6.5, §6.9, §6.10, §6.11, §16.6 WH-002/003/008/M-05/M-11/M-15/WH-101
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/lp-screens.jsx:3-198 (lp_list_page)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/lp-screens.jsx:205-558 (lp_detail_page)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:448-506 (lp_split_modal)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:509-586 (lp_merge_modal)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:916-963 (destroy_scrap_lp_modal)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:1106-1138 (state_transition_confirm_modal)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:1141-1159 (force_unlock_scanner_modal)

## Goal
Implement /(app)/warehouse/lps list + detail + 5 LP-core modals with 1:1 prototype parity, data-prototype-label markers, RBAC-gated destructive actions, and server-driven state transitions.

## Implementation contract
1. RSC page `apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/lps/page.tsx` (list) + `[id]/page.tsx` (detail) per prototype layout.
2. 5 client-island modals under `apps/web/components/warehouse/lp/` each with `data-prototype-label` matching the prototype index entry.
3. Forms use react-hook-form + zodResolver; shadcn Dialog/Form/Table primitives only.
4. Server-driven transitions: state-transition modal reads allowed transitions + reasons via T-019 server action (no client hardcoding).
5. Split modal: every output row requires destination (WH-008); submit disabled if any row missing destination.
6. Force-unlock: hidden/disabled unless session role='Admin'.
7. Destroy/scrap: shadcn destructive variant (uses production design token; BL-PROD-05 must be fixed).

## Files
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/lps/** [create]
- apps/web/components/warehouse/lp/** [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/lp-screens.jsx
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx

## Prototype parity
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/lp-screens.jsx:3-198 (lp_list_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/lp-screens.jsx:205-558 (lp_detail_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:448-506 (lp_split_modal)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:509-586 (lp_merge_modal)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:916-963 (destroy_scrap_lp_modal)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:1106-1138 (state_transition_confirm_modal)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:1141-1159 (force_unlock_scanner_modal)
- Evidence policy: _meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given /warehouse/lps renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/lp-screens.jsx:3-198 (lp_list_page), prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/lp-screens.jsx:205-558 (lp_detail_page), then layout, filters, tabs, row actions, and badges match the prototype (RTL snapshot + parity checklist) AND each implemented surface's root DOM element exposes a matching `data-prototype-label` from prototype-index-warehouse.json.
2. Given the LP Split modal opens with output rows, when any row has no destination_location_id, then submit is disabled and an error message references WH-008.
3. Given the State-Transition modal renders, when 'to_state' is 'blocked', then the reason_code Select lists exactly the allowed reasons returned by the T-019 server action (server-driven).
4. Given the user role is not Admin, when the Force-Unlock action is rendered, then it is hidden (and the server still enforces V-WH-LP-011).

Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a 6th AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F6 2026-05-14).

## Test strategy
- RED: Playwright + RTL tests in `apps/web/components/warehouse/lp/__tests__/` asserting each `data-prototype-label`, parity snapshot, destination-required gate, server-driven reasons, RBAC gate.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test warehouse-lp-ui && pnpm playwright test --project=chromium --grep @warehouse-lp-ui`.
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not make split destination optional (WH-008 hard requirement).
- Do not hardcode state transitions in client — consume server/rule-registry output.
- Do not expose inventory_value fields in this slice (T-045 + T-053 handle).
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to shadcn primitives.
- Do not use HTML `<select>` over shadcn Select.

## Dependencies
- T-016
- T-017
- T-018
- T-019
- T-020
- T-044

RSC page `apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/lps/page.tsx` (list) + `[id]/page.tsx` (detail) per prototype layout. 5 client-island modals under `apps/web/components/warehouse/lp/` each with `data-prototype-label` matching the prototype index entry. AC count consolidated from 6→4 by Fixer F6 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost; the explicit `data-prototype-label` assertion was fused into AC1 alongside the parity-comparison check, and the procedural closeout-evidence AC was relocated to test_strategy + UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md compliance via `ui_evidence_policy` and the checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires fields — closeout must still attach screenshot/Playwright trace artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`).
